title: Component tokens contract
description: Per-component token contract used by the agentic spec layer. Every token a component is allowed to reference, with tier, role, and the resolved primitive.

component.description: kebab-case component name; must match the spec's frontmatter `component` field

version.description: Pinned token version, e.g. tina-ds@HEAD or tina-ds@v1.2.0

fork_model.description: How tokens reference each other in this DS

name.description: Friendly alias used in the spec

role.description: What this token is FOR — e.g. default-fill-primary, focus-ring

path.description: Dotted path in the token JSON
